svg.text: A local-first personal AI assistant with a desktop private core,
mobile PWA companion, generated solution apps, and remote access.
Describe the problem. Studio turns it into
a runnable program for accounting, planning,
Keep AI providers, SQLite data, backups,
Use the paired phone for chat, offline queue,
Use LAN on the same Wi-Fi, or Tailscale,
Cloudflare Tunnel, and trusted HTTPS away.
Maps, web, phone, SMS, mail, and shortcuts
go through allowlists, confirmations, and audits.
Backup, restore, migrations, and release checks
keep the system practical over time.
Desktop app -> Local core -> AI + SQLite + connectivity -> Mobile companion -> Safer local actions
Real screenshots from the current English UI. No concept art.
